gotcha: tracker_root (Synapse repo) and project_root (target project) are distinct locations. Code work happens in {project_root}; dashboard files (initialization.json, logs.json, master_state.json, metrics.json, progress/*.json) MUST live under {tracker_root}/dashboards/. Workers must use the absolute progress path the master provides — never construct relative dashboards/ paths from CWD. The master agent is blocked from writing to {project_root} during an active swarm; instead it must dispatch a worker task. When tracker_root == project_root (Synapse self-targeting), the gates self-bypass.
